race.comment: ZORRO'S FLIGHT (4) returns from a 19-week spell. Finished just three lengths from the winner when fresh from a spell last prep over this distance at The Heath under 1kg more. Recent Horsham jump-out winner. Suspect he is being set for a first-up win with the blinkers back on straight away. ZETALYN (10) had her chance but lacked the change of gears required when fourth over 1100m at Werribee at the second run back from a spell. Has been to the jump-outs since. Best form comes at today's trip and she has won two from two when third-up. Ready to peak. COME ALONG JEFFREY (2) has led all the way to win back-to-back BM56 races over this distance at Kilmore. Goes up a level today but this in-form veteran is difficult to fault. THE KILL CLUB (8) won a similar race to this at Warrnambool two runs back. Perfectly drawn and can bounce back to form without surprising. EL TERCERO (3) placed in a recent Cranbourne jump-out and is worth some thought first-up from a spell.
